page: The Amazon Web Services m8idn.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. It features 48 virtual CPUs (vCPUs) mapped to 24 physical cores with a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, ensuring minimal virtualization overhead and dedicated resource allocation.

For local storage requirements, the m8idn.12xlarge includes 2850 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. This high-capacity local storage is bundled directly with the instance, providing low-latency read and write operations. Networking capabilities are optimized with a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps, which supports high-throughput data transfers and efficient communication with Amazon Elastic Block Store (EBS) volumes.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8idn.12xlarge offers a balanced resource density, combining high-speed Intel processing, substantial memory, and fast local NVMe storage within a single general-purpose profile. This configuration is designed to handle workloads that require a mix of compute power, high network throughput, and fast local storage. Appropriate workloads include relational databases, distributed data stores, enterprise applications, and data-intensive web serving environments.
description: The Amazon Web Services m8idn.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 48 vCPUs across 24 physical cores with a clock speed of 3.9 GHz, paired with 192.0 GB of system memory. The instance includes 2850 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage, offering high-speed local data access. It is optimized for network and EBS performance, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 75 Gbps. This balanced hardware profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense applications, avoiding the need for separate storage provisioning. The m8idn.12xlarge is suited for workloads such as relational databases, enterprise applications, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 48 Intel vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

tagline: A high-throughput general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, fast local NVMe storage, and high-speed baseline networking.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs and 192 GB RAM with a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
Dedicated Intel x86_64 processors operating at 3.9 GHz
2850 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage
75 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput workloads
Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor for dedicated performance
Suited for databases, enterprise applications, and web serving
